entities.name: Canonical Naming
entities.context: Naming convention where names are pulled from registry with format B##_CANONICAL_NAME.md, preventing drift

entities.name: Registry
entities.context: Source for canonical names, ensures no naming drift

entities.name: Manifest
entities.context: Source of truth for block generation, tracks pending/complete status

entities.name: Idempotent
entities.context: Design principle ensuring operations check file existence before generation and skip existing blocks

entities.name: Resumable
entities.context: Design principle allowing generation to continue from last successful block after crashes

entities.name: Cumulative Intelligence Building
entities.context: Approach where all prior blocks are provided as context for incremental knowledge accumulation

entities.name: Token Efficiency
entities.context: Principle of only generating what's needed, skipping existing blocks

entities.name: Validation Gate
entities.context: Quality control mechanism that prevents bad blocks from being marked complete

entities.name: Block Generation Scheduled Task
entities.context: Automated task that runs every 30 minutes to process one block per run in manifest priority order

relationships.context: Names pulled from registry to prevent drift
Manifest is source of truth for checking existence
Parse manifest to find next pending block
Both ensure system integrity and prevent duplicate/bad work
Task implements efficiency by generating only one block per run
Task leverages resumability to continue from last successful block
Manifest tracks blocks for cumulative context provision
